case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. RICARDO D AVILEZ BALAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BALAN, RICARDO D AVILEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00) SERVED OCT-02-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BALAN, RICARDO D AVILEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT RICCARDO D. AVILEZ BLAN DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALAN, RICARDO D AVILEZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
